redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: 3 Postgres-backed migration tests pass against Docker Postgres 16

implementationSummary: Issue #365: added Alembic migration integration tests that seed representative rows, exercise downgrade -1 / upgrade head, and assert data survival, column-only downgrades, and unique constraint enforcement.
assumptions: CI test job Postgres service is the authoritative environment; local skip when DATABASE_URL unreachable
Revision 010_canonical_product_fields is current head for round-trip assertions
risks: Future head migration changes require updating LATEST_REVISION and REVISION_010_COLUMNS constants
